Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, createRoute, createHandler, createClient
+- Reads as: imports from factory classes in src/factory
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper module with exports for creating various Hono components
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createRoute, RouteConfig type, RouteHandler, RouteResponse
+- Reads as: imports types from src/types and route handling utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper for defining and handling HTTP routes
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, WSReadyState, WSMessageReceive, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: imports Context from src/context, types from src/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper with events, context, and upgrade handling
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, appendCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, serialize, deserialize
+- Reads as: imports parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned from src/utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/cookie.ts, src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for managing cookie storage and transmission
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient, testClientRequest
+- Reads as: imports hc from src/client, Hono and ExecutionContext from src
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/client/index.ts, src/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating client-side test clients
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: runtime, env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: uses globalThis, navigator, Deno, fetch, Bun, workerD
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/deno.ts, src/helper/adapter/bun.ts, src/helper/adapter/workerd.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime adapter helper for environment detection and env access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, css, cx, styled, keyframes, defineStylePlugin, defineKeyframesPlugin
+- Reads as: imports from html, jsx/dom/css, and css/common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/jsx/dom/css.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for class names, styles, and keyframe animations
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cxCommon, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTOR
+- Reads as: exports utilities with unique symbols and constants
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/jsx/dom/css.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities with constants and escaped string handling
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyConfig, isCrossOrigin
+- Reads as: imports HTTPException, uses fetch, AbortController, AbortSignal
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTTP proxy helper for forwarding and proxying requests
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName, ShowRoutesError
+- Reads as: imports Hono from src/hono, types from src/types, utils from src/utils
+- Neighbor files: src/dev/server.ts, src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting routes and router debugging
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw, escape, createHtmlStreamPlugin
+- Reads as: imports escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync from utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/html.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/utils/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for creating escaped HTML content and streams
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: static, staticParams, ssg, ssr, createSSGContext, ssgPlugin, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper for static page generation with middleware and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: StaticBuild, generate, BuildOptions, SSGContext, generateSSG
+- Reads as: imports utils from src/utils, types, path handling
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG generation logic to build static files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports Hono from src/hono, METHOD_NAME from src/router, finds target handlers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG path handling and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSGContext, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, handleStaticRender

+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingResponse
+- Reads as: exports from stream, sse, and text

+- Safe summary: Streaming helper with SSE and text streaming capabilities
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

+- Reads as: imports StreamingApi from src/utils/stream, checks Bun version
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts

+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
